'''damuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draconian|draconian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draconian|draconian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| damuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmithith|dæmithith]] || [[word:dæmithij|dæmithij]] || [[word:dæmithish|dæmithish]] || [[word:dæmithi|dæmithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:damumuthuth|damumuthuth]] || [[word:damumuthuj|damumuthuj]] || [[word:damumuthush|damumuthush]] || [[word:damumuthu|damumuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:damuthuth|damuthuth]] || [[word:damuthuj|damuthuj]] || [[word:damuthush|damuthush]] || [[word:damuthu|damuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:damufthuth|damufthuth]] || [[word:damufthuj|damufthuj]] || [[word:damufthush|damufthush]] || [[word:damufthuf|damufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damuthuthu|damuthuthu]] || [[word:damuthuju|damuthuju]] || [[word:damuthushu|damuthushu]] || [[word:damuthuku|damuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damuthuth|damuthuth]] || [[word:damuthuj|damuthuj]] || [[word:damuthush|damuthush]] || [[word:damuthu|damuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damuthuthul|damuthuthul]] || [[word:damuthujul|damuthujul]] || [[word:damuthushul|damuthushul]] || [[word:damuthukul|damuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damuthuthuthu|damuthuthuthu]] || [[word:damuthujuju|damuthujuju]] || [[word:damuthushushu|damuthushushu]] || [[word:damuthuku|damuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damuthuthun|damuthuthun]] || [[word:damuthujun|damuthujun]] || [[word:damuthushun|damuthushun]] || [[word:damuthukun|damuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damuthuthuoro|damuthuthuoro]] || [[word:damuthujuoro|damuthujuoro]] || [[word:damuthushuoro|damuthushuoro]] || [[word:damuthukuoro|damuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
